'''''Gafra''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During [[Operation Strike Fear]] the ''Gafra'' collected a new experimental warhead from [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]] and transported it to a deep space transfer zone.

According to the plan by [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] and the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] technicians who had just joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]], they needed the warhead in order to destroy the [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']] and end Operation Strike Fear. Due to Celanon being too well defended, the Rebels decided to [[Capture of the Gafra|attack]] the ''Gafra'' at the deep space transfer zone.

[[File:Gafra.jpg|thumb|left|250px|''Gafra'' comes under attack from Keyan Farlander.]]
An initial Rebel attack left the ''Gafra'' damaged and stranded before withdrawing. However, the freighter was still protected by a field of [[Space mine/Legends|mines]] around it. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] cleared them out and disabled the freighter. When that was done, the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] [[Herald (Lambda-class)|''Herald'']] came and boarded the freighter in order to lead it to the Alliance headquarters.

However, when the shuttle was done and the freighter was ready to enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|stormtrooper transports]] came and attempted to destroy the freighter, but Farlander was able to drive them off.

With the help of abducted [[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus Corp]] staff, the warhead was then delivered to the ''Invincible'' in a shuttle modified to appear to be an Imperial vessel, and the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] was blown up from the inside.
